issues.description: Condition type is completely wrong. The text says 'If you have 2 or less Life cards' which checks the number of Life cards remaining, not turn count. Should use a condition that checks Life count, but no such condition type exists in the schema. This fundamentally changes when the effect can activate.
The card has [Blocker] keyword which should be represented in the DSL, but it's missing from the effects array. Blocker is a static keyword ability.
